The World This Morning
Mon, 11 May 2026 00:26:00 GMT · CNBC
From Singapore to Brussels, world leaders eye Trump-Xi summit from afar
Trump and Xi meet in Beijing Thursday to discuss trade, tech, and more. The outcome may disrupt global supply chains and impact economies in Europe, Japan, and South Korea.
Mon, 11 May 2026 04:33:07 +0000 · Al Jazeera
Russia and Ukraine accuse the other of ceasefire violations
Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of ceasefire violations, with Ukraine's Zelenskyy citing continued frontline fighting and Russia reporting over 1,000 violations. This escalation may hinder diplomatic efforts to establish a lasting peace agreement.
Mon, 11 May 2026 04:32:00 GMT · AP News
One evacuated passenger tests positive for hantavirus, another develops symptoms on flights home
1 US passenger tested positive for hantavirus, 1 French passenger showed symptoms on flight home. This may lead to increased screening for hantavirus on international flights.
Mon, 11 May 2026 00:46:00 GMT · NBC News
6 people found dead inside cargo train boxcar in Texas
6 people were found dead in a Texas cargo train boxcar near Laredo. This incident may impact border security and immigration policies in the region.
Mon, 11 May 2026 04:18:31 +0000 · Al Jazeera
Thailand’s Thaksin Shinawatra released from prison
Thaksin Shinawatra, Thailand's ex-PM, was released from prison in Bangkok after 8 months. His release may impact Thailand's political landscape and upcoming elections.
From the Subscriptions
No new videos today.
The Adversary's Desk
TL;DRThis week's focus: agentic ai security and adversarial attacks.
Thu, 07 May 2026 20:22:39 GMT · Microsoft
When prompts become shells: RCE vulnerabilities in AI agent frameworks
Microsoft reports RCE vulnerabilities in AI agent frameworks like Semantic Kernel and LangChain. This means attackers can inject malicious prompts to execute arbitrary code.
Fri, 08 May 2026 17:06:16 GMT · Towards Data Science
The AI Agent Security Surface: What Gets Exposed When You Add Tools and Memory
88% of organizations reported compromised AI agents, says Gravitee's 2026 report. This exposes a broader attack surface for defenders to consider.
Fri, 08 May 2026 12:35:18 GMT · wiz.io
7 AI Security Tools to Prepare You for Every Attack Phase
Wiz's AI security tool uses AI-SPM to combat shadow AI. It helps defenders align tools to each attack phase.
Fri, 08 May 2026 09:06:45 GMT · csoonline.com
Pen tests show AI security flaws far more severe than legacy software bugs
Cobalt's report finds 32% of AI/LLM pen test findings are high-risk, with a 38% resolution rate. This means AI systems pose a higher security risk than legacy software.
2026-05-08
Tong Zheng, Haolin Liu, Chengsong Huang et al.
LLMs Improving LLMs: Agentic Discovery for Test-Time Scaling
agentic AI
AutoTTS automatically discovers test-time scaling strategies for large language models. Practitioners can use it to improve model performance without manual tuning.
2026-05-08
Jiatao Gu, Tianrong Chen, Ying Shen et al.
Normalizing Trajectory Models
adversarial
Normalizing Trajectory Models (NTM) uses conditional normalizing flows for efficient sampling. Practitioners can use NTM to generate high-quality images in few steps, improving generation speed.
2026-05-08
Maryam Maghsoudi, Shihab Shamma
Zero-Shot Imagined Speech Decoding via Imagined-to-Listened MEG Mapping
safety
This paper proposes a method to decode imagined speech from brain recordings by mapping imagined to listened brain activity. It helps prevent eavesdropping on brain signals by revealing how imagined speech can be decoded.
2026-05-08
Jerry Jiang, Haowen Sun, Denis Gudovskiy et al.
Proxy3D: Efficient 3D Representations for Vision-Language Models via Semantic Clustering and Alignment
safety
Proxy3D proposes 3D representations for vision-language models via semantic clustering. It improves spatial intelligence in models, enabling better 3D scene understanding.
2026-05-08
Jiaxiu Jiang, Jingjing Ren, Wenbo Li et al.
TextLDM: Language Modeling with Continuous Latent Diffusion
safety
TextLDM applies latent diffusion to text generation, using a VAE and Transformer. It helps defend against text-based attacks by generating more coherent and context-specific text.
Subscribe via RSS

The World This Morning
Sun, 10 May 2026 17:09:28 GMT · CBS News
Sen. Mark Kelly says Trump administration's $1.5 trillion Pentagon budget request is "outrageous"
Sen. Mark Kelly calls the Trump administration's $1.5 trillion Pentagon budget request "outrageous". This 42% increase may face resistance in Congress, impacting defense spending negotiations.
Sun, 10 May 2026 17:06:02 GMT · CBS News
International operation disrupts "cocaine highway" across the Atlantic Ocean
International operation seizes 12 tons of cocaine, arrests 54. Disruption of "cocaine highway" hampers Latin American-Europe drug trade.
Sun, 10 May 2026 17:32:54 GMT · Reuters
Ukraine, Russia trade accusations of violating US-backed ceasefire
Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of violating a US-backed ceasefire. This escalation may lead to renewed conflict and impact regional stability.
Sun, 10 May 2026 10:22:21 GMT · Reuters
Aramco CEO warns 1 billion barrels lost will slow oil market recovery
Aramco CEO warns 1 billion barrels lost will slow oil market recovery. This loss may lead to higher prices and reduced supply.
From the Subscriptions
No new videos today.
The Adversary's Desk
TL;DRThis week's focus: agentic ai security.
Thu, 07 May 2026 17:03:32 GMT · wiz.io
What is AI Security Posture Management (AI-SPM)?
Wiz.io reports 85% of enterprises use managed AI services, with 53% using OpenAI or Azure OpenAI SDKs. This means defenders must prioritize AI security posture management to mitigate risks.
Fri, 08 May 2026 17:06:16 GMT · Towards Data Science
The AI Agent Security Surface: What Gets Exposed When You Add Tools and Memory
88% of organizations reported concerns with AI agent security, citing risks from tools and memory. This expands the attack surface for defenders and red-teamers to consider.
Fri, 08 May 2026 12:35:18 GMT · wiz.io
7 AI Security Tools to Prepare You for Every Attack Phase
Wiz offers AI security tools to combat shadow AI. Defenders should align tools to each attack phase for strong AI security.
Fri, 08 May 2026 09:06:45 GMT · csoonline.com
Pen tests show AI security flaws far more severe than legacy software bugs
Cobalt's report finds 32% of AI/LLM pen test findings are high-risk, with a 38% resolution rate. This means AI systems pose significant security risks that defenders must prioritize.
2026-05-07
Daniel Zheng, Ingrid von Glehn, Yori Zwols et al.
AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
agentic AI
The paper proposes an AI system that assists mathematicians in research by providing interactive tools for ideation and exploration. Practitioners should care because it can help solve complex math problems and uncover new research directions.
2026-05-07
Dasol Choi, Eugenia Kim, Jaewon Noh et al.
XL-SafetyBench: A Country-Grounded Cross-Cultural Benchmark for LLM Safety and Cultural Sensitivity
jailbreak adversarial safety
XL-SafetyBench proposes a benchmark for evaluating LLM safety and cultural sensitivity across 10 countries. It helps practitioners identify LLMs that can detect culturally specific harms and avoid offensive responses.
2026-05-07
Xiangyuan Xue, Yifan Zhou, Zidong Wang et al.
StraTA: Incentivizing Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Strategic Trajectory Abstraction
agentic AI
StraTA proposes a framework that introduces trajectory-level strategy into reinforcement learning. It improves sample efficiency and performance in interactive tasks, enabling better decision-making in complex environments.
2026-05-07
Sushant Gautam, Finn Schwall, Annika Willoch Olstad et al.
When No Benchmark Exists: Validating Comparative LLM Safety Scoring Without Ground-Truth Labels
safety
This paper proposes a method to compare language models' safety without labeled benchmarks. It helps practitioners validate model safety before deploying them in sensitive areas.
Subscribe via RSS

US awaits Iran's response on peace deal as month-long ceasefire holds. This matters as a rejected deal could escalate violence, impacting global oil prices and regional stability.
Sat, 09 May 2026 11:37:00 GMT · AP News
President of Parks and Rec? Trump asserts authority over public spaces in DC
Trump ordered the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repainted "American flag blue" at a cost of $1.9 million. This move asserts his authority over public spaces in DC, potentially setting a precedent for future presidential involvement in park management.
Sat, 09 May 2026 14:36:00 GMT · The Guardian
Péter Magyar sworn in as Hungary’s prime minister to end 16-year Orbán era
Péter Magyar was sworn in as Hungary's prime minister, ending Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule. This shift may lead to a more pro-European stance in Hungarian politics.
Sat, 09 May 2026 16:27:53 GMT · The New York Times
Frontier Jet Hits Person on Runway During Takeoff at Denver Airport
Frontier jet hits person on runway at Denver Airport. Incident sparks safety review.
Sat, 09 May 2026 12:27:59 GMT · The Guardian
Guardian reporter and colleagues detained and beaten by Somali police
Mohamed Bulbul and 2 colleagues were detained and beaten by Somali police in Mogadishu. This incident may escalate crackdowns on journalists as Somalia's presidential term ends on May 15.

safety
Relit-LiVE is a video relighting framework that uses raw reference images to improve rendering. It helps prevent distorted appearances and temporal artifacts in relit videos.

Justice for Shireen: The American investigation
Shireen Abu Akleh's family seeks US-backed investigation 4 years after her killing by Israeli forces. This pursuit of accountability may impact US-Israel relations and journalist protections.

item.description: Weather: 53°F - Mostly Sunny | Illness level: NORMAL | 2 major events this week | 4 top news stories | 2 YouTube videos | 7 AI security updates

The World This Morning
Sun, 12 Apr 2026 13:06:00 GMT · AP News
Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of violating Putin’s Easter ceasefire
Russia and Ukraine accused each other of violating a 32-hour Easter ceasefire. This escalation may lead to renewed fighting, impacting regional stability.
Sun, 12 Apr 2026 17:06:31 GMT · DW.com
Hungary election: Polls close as Orban faces pivotal vote
Hungary's polls closed with Orban likely defeated, Tisza party projected to win. A Tisza victory could bring significant reforms with a potential two-thirds majority in parliament.
Sun, 12 Apr 2026 09:45:24 GMT · moneywise.com
Bessent and Powell call emergency meeting with bank CEOs after Anthropic's Mythos AI finds thousands of zero-day exploits
Treasury Secretary Bessent and Fed Chair Powell met with CEOs of major US banks on April 7 to discuss Anthropic's Mythos AI, which found thousands of zero-day exploits. This meeting matters as it may lead to new cybersecurity measures, potentially impacting the global financial system's stability.
Sun, 12 Apr 2026 03:54:59 GMT · ABC7 New York
Reports of multiple people shot inside Chick-fil-A in Union, New Jersey; investigation ongoing
Multiple people were shot inside a Chick-fil-A in Union, New Jersey, on Route 22, just before 9 p.m. Saturday. This incident may impact local business operations and public safety concerns in the area.
From the Subscriptions
AI Daily Brief
Anthropic Now Leads OpenAI in Annualized Revenue
2026-04-12
Anthropic's revenue has tripled to a $30 billion run rate, surpassing OpenAI. The AI industry struggles to make a case for its existence, despite massive revenue growth.
Morning Brew Daily
‘The Audacity’ exposes dark side of Silicon Valley billionaires
2026-04-12
Gen Zers invest based on "finfluencer" content, with 70% influenced by it. Vivian Tu, a Wall Street trader turned finfluencer, reaches millions with relatable advice.
The Adversary's Desk
TL;DRThis week's focus: agentic ai security and prompt injection.
Wed, 08 Apr 2026 11:03:25 GMT · csoonline.com
LLM-generated passwords are indefensible. Your codebase may already prove it
Irregular and Kaspersky found LLM-generated passwords, like those from Claude Opus 4.6, follow predictable patterns. This means defenders should not rely on AI-generated passwords, as they can be easily guessed despite appearing complex.
Tue, 07 Apr 2026 19:23:15 GMT · TechNadu
GrafanaGhost Exploit Exfiltrates Sensitive Grafana Business Data via Indirect Prompt Injection
Grafana's indirect prompt injection vulnerability, GrafanaGhost, allows silent data exfiltration. This means AI system defenders should review Grafana configurations for potential exploitability.
Thu, 09 Apr 2026 16:03:17 GMT · Security Boulevard
LangChain, Langflow, LiteLLM: When AI’s Foundation Code Becomes the Attack Surface
LangChain, Langflow, and LiteLLM were hit with high-severity vulnerabilities and exploits. This means defenders should scrutinize AI foundation code for weaknesses.
Fri, 10 Apr 2026 19:57:52 GMT · citybuzz -
VectorCertain’s MYTHOS Program: A Game-Changer in AI Security Standards
VectorCertain's MYTHOS program detected and prevented 100% of 7,000 adversarial scenarios. This means defenders can rely on high detection rates for Anthropic Mythos threat vectors.
2026-04-09
Boyang Zhang, Sebastián G. Acosta, Preston Carlson et al.
ParseBench: A Document Parsing Benchmark for AI Agents
agentic AI
ParseBench benchmarks AI document parsing with 2000 verified pages. It reveals gaps in parsing tables, charts, and formatting, which can lead to incorrect autonomous decisions.
2026-04-09
Chuzhan Hao, Wenfeng Feng, Guochao Jiang et al.
Beyond Stochastic Exploration: What Makes Training Data Valuable for Agentic Search
agentic AI
The paper proposes a framework to improve reinforcement learning for search agents by extracting knowledge from experience. This helps prevent inefficient exploration, making search more stable and effective.
2026-04-09
Zhengyang Sun, Yu Chen, Xin Zhou et al.
When Numbers Speak: Aligning Textual Numerals and Visual Instances in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
safety
This paper proposes a framework to improve text-to-video models' ability to generate the correct number of objects specified in a prompt. Practitioners should care because it reduces errors in video synthesis, such as incorrect object counts.
